title: Number of Ways to Reach a Position After Exactly k Steps
titleCn: 恰好移动 k 步到达某一位置的方法数目

testcases.input: startPos = 1, endPos = 2, k = 3 Output: 3 Explanation: We can reach position 2 from 1 in exactly 3 steps in three ways: - 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 2. - 1 -> 2 -> 1 -> 2. - 1 -> 0 -> 1 -> 2. It can be proven that no other way is possible, so we return 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: We can reach position 2 from 1 in exactly 3 steps in three ways: - 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 2. - 1 -> 2 -> 1 -> 2. - 1 -> 0 -> 1 -> 2. It can be proven that no other way is possible, so we return 3.

testcases.input: startPos = 2, endPos = 5, k = 10 Output: 0 Explanation: It is impossible to reach position 5 from position 2 in exactly 10 steps.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: It is impossible to reach position 5 from position 2 in exactly 10 steps.
